title: freziera minima
intro: Freziera minima, also known as the False Copal, is a plant species native to Central and South America. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Freziera minima include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Freziera minima include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
